utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details and explicit costs (monthly and annual). Health coverage includes both physical and mental health with coverage descriptions and costs. Property coverage includes a clear description and costs. Travel coverage is fully described with costs. Additional services include two sub-items, each with coverage details and costs. Total budget includes full monthly and annual breakdown plus comparison metrics. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final coverage plan includes the following components: (1) physical health coverage costing €100/month, (2) mental health coverage costing €65/month, (3) property coverage costing €55/month, (4) travel coverage costing €115/month, (5) travel assistance service costing €10/month, and (6) premium membership costing €20/month. 

Cross-referencing these with the ground-truth ratings:
- Physical health coverage at €100/month aligns with LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) or VitalPlus Standard Plan (rating 6). Description includes 'comprehensive international health with preventive care and global network' which matches VitalPlus Standard Plan (preventive care focus, €100/month). Hence physical_health → VitalPlus Standard Plan (rating 6).
- Mental health coverage at €65/month matches LifeFirst Standard Plan (€65/month, rating 8), offering therapy, psychiatry, and crisis support, consistent with the description.
- Property coverage at €55/month aligns with HomeFirst Standard Coverage (€55/month, rating 7), as it includes replacement value and global protection, consistent with the plan’s description.
- Travel coverage at €115/month directly matches PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month, rating 10), described as luxury global travel protection with unlimited medical coverage.
- Travel assistance service (€10/month) corresponds to 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 9) under travel_enhancement_services.
- Premium membership (€20/month) matches Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10) under general_services.

Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived as follows.
